meta.title: SEO Specialist & Web Developer - Switzerland
meta.description: Freelance SEO specialist & web developer in Basel, Switzerland. I help businesses rank on Google page 1 with high-converting websites. 120-day guarantee.

hero.headline: I get Swiss businesses to
hero.headlineEnd: in 120 days, or you pay nothing.
hero.subheadline: SEO (Search Engine Optimization) is the process of improving your website to rank higher on Google. According to Backlinko, the #1 result gets 27.6% of all clicks — while page 2 gets less than 1%. I am a Basel-based SEO specialist with 10+ years of hands-on experience building fast, conversion-optimized websites that rank. Not an agency. Not outsourced. Just measurable results.
hero.testimonial: "buweb.ch got us from page 3 to page 1 in 6 weeks. Our leads increased by 340%. Best investment we made."

problem.label: THE REALITY
problem.headline: 75% of users never click to page 2. Every day you are not on page 1, your competitors are stealing your customers.
problem.stat1: of users never click past page 1 (Backlinko, 2024)
problem.stat2: of B2B buyers start their research with a Google search (Google, 2024)
problem.stat3: more clicks for position 1 vs position 3 (First Page Sage, 2024)
problem.body: Search Engine Optimization (SEO) is the practice of improving your website's visibility on search engines like Google. When potential customers search for services you offer, 75% never look past the first page. If your business is not on page 1, you are effectively invisible — and that invisibility costs you revenue every single day. A typical Swiss SME loses CHF 15,000–50,000 annually in missed organic search traffic.

solution.label: THE SOLUTION
solution.headline: SEO + fast website = more customers. I handle everything.
solution.subheadline: Technical SEO audits, content strategy, website development, and AI automation. I build websites that load in under 1 second and rank on Google page 1 within 120 days — guaranteed.

items.title: Technical SEO
items.desc: Site speed optimization (Core Web Vitals), mobile-first indexing, structured data (Schema.org), and crawlability fixes. Google uses page speed as a ranking factor since 2021.

items.title: Content Strategy
items.desc: Keyword research, E-E-A-T content that ranks, and blog posts optimized for both traditional SEO and AI search engines like ChatGPT and Perplexity.

items.title: Web Development
items.desc: Hand-coded Astro sites that load in 0.3s, mobile-first responsive design, and conversion-optimized layouts built to capture leads.

items.title: AI Platform Optimization
items.desc: GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) ensures your business gets cited by ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, and Perplexity when potential customers ask AI about services in your industry.

trust.label: WHY TRUST ME
trust.headline: You talk to me. I do the work.
trust.body: Swiss-based freelance SEO specialist with over 10 years of hands-on experience. Self-taught, not bootcamp. I personally handle every project from strategy to execution. No juniors. No outsourcing.

pricing.label: PRICING
pricing.headline: Investment that pays for itself
pricing.subheadline: Every package is designed to generate ROI within 90 days. No hidden fees. No long-term contracts.

retainer.text: Need ongoing growth? Monthly SEO retainers at CHF 790/month. 8 hours of work, monthly reports, no minimum contract.

guarantee.title: 120-Day Page 1 Guarantee
guarantee.text: If your website doesn't reach page 1 within 120 days, I'll refund 100% of your investment. No questions asked.
guarantee.terms: Terms: No simultaneous work with other SEO agencies. No black-hat tactics.

items.q: How long until I see results?
items.a: Most clients see improvements within 2-4 weeks. I guarantee page 1 rankings within 120 days or you get your money back.
Yes! You can pay in monthly installments (up to 10 months) with no extra fees.

items.q: What if I don't get to page 1?
items.a: You get a full refund. No questions asked. I only win when you win.
I'm based in Basel, Switzerland and primarily serve the DACH region. I work remotely with clients worldwide.
